segments.text: Lesson 50.

translation.text: 第50课。

segments.text: New Year Resolutions.

translation.text: 新年决心。

segments.text: Listen to the tape, then answer the question below.

translation.text: 听录音，然后回答以下问题。

segments.text: What marked the end of the writer's New Year resolutions?

translation.text: 什么标志着作者的新年决心彻底告终？

segments.text: The New Year is a time for resolutions.

translation.text: 新年是下决心的时候。

segments.text: Mentally, at least, most of us could compile formidable lists of do's and don'ts.

translation.text: 至少在心里，我们大多数人都能列出一长串该做和不该做的事。

segments.text: The same old favorites recur year in, year out, with monotonous regularity.

translation.text: 那些老一套的热门项目年复一年，以单调的规律反复出现。

segments.text: We resolve to get up earlier each morning, eat less, find more time to play with the children, do a thousand and one jobs about the house, be nice to people we don't like, drive carefully, and take the dog for a walk

translation.text: 我们决心每天早起、少吃、多抽时间陪孩子玩、做完家中无数杂事、善待不喜欢的人、谨慎驾驶，并带狗出去散步

segments.text: every day.

translation.text: 每天都如此。

segments.text: Past experience has taught us that certain accomplishments are beyond attainment.

translation.text: 以往经验告诉我们，有些成就是无法达到的。

segments.text: If we remain inveterate smokers, it is only because we have so often experienced the frustration that results from failure.

translation.text: 如果我们仍是根深蒂固的烟民，那只是因为我们太多次体验过失败带来的挫折。

segments.text: Most of us fail in our efforts at self-improvement because our schemes are too ambitious and we never have time to carry them out.

translation.text: 我们大多数人的自我改善努力都以失败告终，因为计划过于宏大，而且永远没有时间实施。

segments.text: We also make the fundamental error of announcing our resolutions to everybody so that we look even more foolish when we slip back into our bad old ways.

translation.text: 我们还会犯一个根本错误：把决心告诉所有人，以至于重回过去的坏习惯时显得更加可笑。

segments.text: Aware of these pitfalls, this year I attempted to keep my resolutions to myself.

translation.text: 意识到这些陷阱，今年我尽力把决心藏在心里。

segments.text: I limited myself to two modest ambitions.

translation.text: 我只给自己定了两个不高的目标。

segments.text: To do physical exercises every morning and to read more of an evening.

translation.text: 每天早晨锻炼，晚上多读书。

segments.text: An all-night party on New Year's Eve provided me with a good excuse for not carrying out either of these new resolutions on the first day of the year, but on the second I applied myself assiduously to the

translation.text: 除夕通宵聚会给了我一个好借口，让我元旦当天两个新决心都没执行；但第二天我便勤奋地投入

segments.text: task.

translation.text: 这项任务。

segments.text: The daily exercises lasted only eleven minutes and I proposed to do them early in the morning before anyone had got up.

translation.text: 每天锻炼只需11分钟，我打算在早晨所有人起床前完成。

segments.text: The self-discipline required to drag myself out of bed eleven minutes earlier than usual was considerable.

translation.text: 要比平时早11分钟把自己从床上拖起来，需要相当强的自制力。

segments.text: Nevertheless, I managed to creep down into the living room for two days before anyone found me out.

translation.text: 尽管如此，我还是连续两天悄悄下楼进了客厅，才被人发现。

segments.text: After jumping about on the carpet and twisting the human frame into uncomfortable positions, I sat down at the breakfast table in an exhausted condition.

translation.text: 在地毯上蹦跳，又把身体扭成种种不舒服的姿势后，我筋疲力尽地坐到早餐桌旁。

segments.text: It was this that portrayed me.

translation.text: 正是这一点暴露了我。

segments.text: The next morning the whole family trooped in to watch the performance.

translation.text: 第二天早晨，全家人列队进来观看我的表演。

segments.text: That was really unsettling, but I fended off the taunts and jibes of the family good-humoredly and soon everybody got used to the idea.

translation.text: 这实在令人心神不宁，不过我还是和气地挡住了家人的嘲弄和挖苦，很快大家便习惯了。

segments.text: However, my enthusiasm waned.

translation.text: 然而，我的热情渐渐消退。

segments.text: The time I spent at exercises gradually diminished.

translation.text: 我用于锻炼的时间逐渐缩短。

segments.text: Little by little the eleven minutes fell to zero.

translation.text: 那11分钟一点一点降到了零。

segments.text: By January 10th I was back to where I had started from.

translation.text: 到1月10日，我又回到了起点。

segments.text: I argued that if I spent less time exhausting myself at exercises in the morning, I would keep my mind fresh for reading when I got home from work.

translation.text: 我辩解说，如果早晨少花时间把自己锻炼得精疲力竭，下班回家后就能保持清醒的头脑读书。

segments.text: Resisting the hypnotizing effect of television, I sat in my room for a few evenings with my eyes glued to a book.

translation.text: 我抵抗着电视的催眠作用，连续几个晚上坐在房间里，目不转睛地盯着一本书。

segments.text: One night, however, feeling cold and lonely, I went downstairs and sat in front of the television pretending to read.

translation.text: 然而一天晚上，我觉得又冷又孤单，便下楼坐到电视机前，假装读书。

segments.text: That proved to be my undoing.

translation.text: 这成了我失败的根源。

segments.text: For I soon got back to my old bad habit of dozing off in front of the screen.

translation.text: 因为我很快又恢复了在电视机前打瞌睡的老毛病。

segments.text: I still haven't given up my resolution to do more reading.

translation.text: 我仍没有放弃多读书的决心。

segments.text: In fact, I have just bought a book entitled, How to Read a Thousand Words a Minute.

translation.text: 事实上，我刚买了一本名叫《一分钟读一千字》的书。

segments.text: Perhaps it will solve my problem, but I just haven't had time to read it.

translation.text: 也许它能解决我的问题，可我就是一直没时间读它。
